message:
feat(core): real SQLite binary format persistence (bd-1w6k.2.2)

Replace SQL text dump persistence with proper SQLite binary format
via the pager+btree stack. On persist, MemDatabase tables are written
to a real SQLite file with valid header, sqlite_master, and B-tree
pages. On load, format is auto-detected so legacy text dumps still
work as fallback.

New compat_persist module: persist_to_sqlite, load_from_sqlite,
is_sqlite_format. 10 dedicated tests including rusqlite roundtrip.
91 existing connection tests pass with zero regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
